center.name: 中美 (政治地理学)
center.summary: 中美 (政治地理学)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Guatemalan flicker、Spectacled parrotlet、Spot-crowned woodcreeper等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Middle America from southern Mexico to Nicaragua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Spectacled parrotlets are endemic to Middle and South America, including northern and central Colombia, Venezuela, and eastern Panama (subspecies can be found in specific regions of Colombia and Venezuela, see above)
